prompts.text: Based on all available information, how likely do you think this headline is to be true?
Based on all available information, how likely do you think this headline is to be true?
Suppose this user was commenting on whether a politically neutral headline was true or not, how likely are they to be right about the veracity of the headline?

Based on all available information, set the slider to -100 if the first participant's comment supports the headline, and to 100 if it opposes the headline. Do not place the slider on any number other than -100 or 100.

Based on all available information, how strongly do you think the first participant is biased toward one political side?

A stronger bias means they are more likely to endorse claims that align with their party's view or reject claims that misalign with it, regardless of whether those claims are true.
